# Firmware Update Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize deterministic firmware-update utility behavior before KMP migration: device-info protobuf mapping, available-version comparison, and firmware package file ordering. `FirmwareUpdateUtilityCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared common coverage for device-info mapping, zero/default version preservation, dotted integer version comparison, invalid-version typed parse failure policy, `SYSUPDAT.IMG` file ordering, and `sdk/firmware-update/utility-readiness.json`/`firmware-utility-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `firmwareUtilityReadinessManifestNamesEveryPreMigrationBehaviorFamily` for `device-info-protobuf-mapping`, `zero-version-preservation`, `dotted-integer-version-comparison`, `invalid-version-typed-parse-failure`, `system-update-file-ordering-last`, `platform-firmware-utility-vector-references`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production firmware utility code moves. `workflow-runtime-policy.json` pins the fake network, retryable fake-network server failure, fake filesystem/zip, cancellation cleanup before BLE writes, and fake BLE write scenarios required before moving firmware update workflow orchestration to common code; `workflow-runtime-readiness.json` pins the complete behavior-family gate, including progress, cancellation cleanup, retry scheduling, facade error mapping, and compile-verified shared execution; `FirmwareUpdateCommonFakeWorkflowTest.kt` consumes the deterministic subset as an Android-hosted common-style prototype, and `FirmwareWorkflowRuntimePolicyCommonTest.kt` now consumes the same subset plus readiness manifest as executable shared `commonTest` coverage while production adapter progress, retry scheduling, and facade error mapping remain gated.
